'''mazhaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycotherapy|mycotherapy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycotherapy|mycotherapy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mazhaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzhæyæth|mæzhæyæth]] || [[word:mæzhæyæj|mæzhæyæj]] || [[word:mæzhæyæsh|mæzhæyæsh]] || [[word:mæzhæyæ|mæzhæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazhazhayath|mazhazhayath]] || [[word:mazhazhayaj|mazhazhayaj]] || [[word:mazhazhayash|mazhazhayash]] || [[word:mazhazhaya|mazhazhaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazhayath|mazhayath]] || [[word:mazhayaj|mazhayaj]] || [[word:mazhayash|mazhayash]] || [[word:mazhaya|mazhaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazhafyath|mazhafyath]] || [[word:mazhafyaj|mazhafyaj]] || [[word:mazhafyash|mazhafyash]] || [[word:mazhafyaf|mazhafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazhayatha|mazhayatha]] || [[word:mazhayaja|mazhayaja]] || [[word:mazhayasha|mazhayasha]] || [[word:mazhayaka|mazhayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazhayath|mazhayath]] || [[word:mazhayaj|mazhayaj]] || [[word:mazhayash|mazhayash]] || [[word:mazhaya|mazhaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazhayathal|mazhayathal]] || [[word:mazhayajal|mazhayajal]] || [[word:mazhayashal|mazhayashal]] || [[word:mazhayakal|mazhayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazhayathatha|mazhayathatha]] || [[word:mazhayajaja|mazhayajaja]] || [[word:mazhayashasha|mazhayashasha]] || [[word:mazhayaka|mazhayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazhayathan|mazhayathan]] || [[word:mazhayajan|mazhayajan]] || [[word:mazhayashan|mazhayashan]] || [[word:mazhayakan|mazhayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazhayathaoro|mazhayathaoro]] || [[word:mazhayajaoro|mazhayajaoro]] || [[word:mazhayashaoro|mazhayashaoro]] || [[word:mazhayakaoro|mazhayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
